currentTask.context: Designing Game 13: Snake Oil - fast-talking frontier merchant, match ingredients to ailments, sliding inventory tray

gameQueue.title: Snake Oil
gameQueue.concept: Fast-talking merchant mini-game: match ingredients to ailments described by townsfolk in real-time. A sliding inventory tray and time pressure create a juggling act between persuasion and supply chain.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First matching/inventory puzzle, first NPC dialogue-driven mechanic, first game with multiple simultaneous customers

gameQueue.title: Midnight Rodeo
gameQueue.concept: Bareback bull-riding survival: tilt your balance left/right to match the bull's spin direction while a crowd-energy meter determines your score multiplier. Timed survival with escalating spin patterns.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First balance/gyro-style mechanic, first crowd-energy system, most physically intuitive input in the series

gameQueue.title: Prairie Fire
gameQueue.concept: Wildfire simulation strategy: a wind-driven fire spreads on a cellular grid toward your homestead. Place firebreaks and water buckets with limited resources, watch the wind shift, and protect your land as the blaze accelerates.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First cellular automaton simulation in the series, first strategy/placement game, first game with environmental destruction and wind physics

runLog.summary: Built Game 06: Cattle Drive (cattle-drive.html). Flocking AI, wolf predators, 13 tests pass.
Built Game 07: Tin Star Showdown (tin-star-showdown.html). Quick-draw duel, best-of-3, AI difficulty scaling, 13 tests pass.
Built Game 08: Dust Devil (dust-devil.html). 2-axis physics tumbleweed, tap-to-gust canyon navigation, 14 tests pass.
Built Game 09: Wanted Poster. Memory/deduction face-ID mechanic, procedural face system, 15 tests pass.
Built Game 10: Gold Rush — lantern-lit cave mining, BFS pathfinding, triple resource management, 16 tests pass.
Built Game 10: Gold Rush — lantern-lit cave mining, BFS pathfinding, triple resource management, 16 tests pass.
Built Game 11: Boot Hill Bluff - turn-based bluffing duel with AI tell system, narrative choices, chip betting. 18 tests pass.
Built Game 12: Stampede - first-person buffalo stampede, 3-lane dodge, signal herd mechanic. 23 tests pass.
